name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
administered_by: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
retrieval_text: Collateral-free credit for artisans and craftspeople from 18 traditional family-based trades, disbursed in two tranches: Rs 1 lakh for an 18-month tenure, followed by Rs 2 lakh for a 30-month tenure after satisfactory repayment of the first. Borrowers pay a fixed concessional interest rate of 5% per annum; the Ministry of MSME pays an 8% interest subvention upfront to the lending bank. Applicants must be 18 or older, registered under one of the specified trades, and must not have taken a loan under similar schemes such as PM SVANidhi, PMEGP, or MUDRA in the preceding 5 years; government employees and their immediate family are excluded.
